title: Pixel´s Fresh Leaves
description: Pixel's Fresh Leaves retexturizes the leaf blocks to make them bushier
body:
Pixel's Fresh Leaves retextures Minecraft's leaf blocks to make them bushier and more visually appealing — all while preserving the charm of the original vanilla style.

🍃** New bushy textures for:
**
![Oak leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/912da4b7a365cc074a7bd504a4511ee183ecbcb8.png)![Spruce leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a736a5224efb7fc607266f41f42e4eb996d479a7.png)![Birch leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a69dc378516b8f50ffd5ec09a685d6f9c9b2df1.png)![Jungle leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18ce0984e25afefb74120adde169b1546fb3a2c7.png)![Acacia leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df50884827ecc7e852f3c32ea6f6938b1f300455.png)![Dark Oak Leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d08fc0ce56f89a6e8473932b12c80701f4b477e.png)![Mangrove leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/969e7e35e00d9845b15df515a1c64d200364f7c7.png)![Cherry leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65d3c2dfe69f8de87e9a8b526c5271377eb95f64.png)![Pale Oak leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d32cd4cfb64bc5f5ad403d68ab10cb5d4cf995b4.png)![Azalea and Flowering Azalea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09d4813cc9b633cf64d9bfe6934a9b7aeebb4423.png)
